sales.title: Triton XXVII – Session 6 Lot: 6017. Tiberius. AD 14-37. AR Denarius (18mm, 3.81 g, 1h). Lugdunum (Lyon) mint. Struck AD 15-16. NGC VF, 4/5, 5/5.
sales.description: Roman Imperial, Silver Estimated: $   400 Sold Price: $   650

TIBERIUS, A.D. 14-37. AR Denarius (3.86 gms), Lugdunum Mint, ca. A.D. 18-35. NGC EF, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 4/5. Light Marks.
To view all items from the John P. Burnham Collection, click  here.
RIC-30; RSC-16a. "Tribute Penny" type. Obverse: Laureate head right; Reverse: Livia, as Pax, seated right on chair, holding scepter and olive branch, and with feet on footstool; ornate chair legs, single line below.

From the John P. Burnham Collection.

Estimate: 300 - 500...
